market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are solid resistance. Put walls are solid support. Gamma flip acts as a pivot point. Expect mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Low volatility expected due to massive positive Total GEX.
outlook.summary: Despite a strong bearish put skew and high put/call ratios across all expirations, the heavily positive Total GEX (31.60B) forces market makers to suppress volatility and stabilize prices. Spot is trapped between structural supports and call walls, with a high probability of price magnetizing towards the Monthly Max Pain at 6900.

levels.motivazione: Massive Call OI in MONTHLY (18107) and 0DTE (7955). Coincides exactly with MONTHLY Max Pain, creating a powerful gravitational pull and a hard resistance ceiling.
Highest Call OI in 0DTE (9102). Acts as an intraday harmonic ceiling and strict structural barrier.
MONTHLY Gamma Flip. Marks the systemic gamma equilibrium transition right below the 6900 resistance cluster.
WEEKLY Gamma Flip. Key structural equilibrium level acting as dynamic support for the current weekly price action.
Heavy Put/Call concentration across 0DTE and MONTHLY. Creates structural friction where market makers will actively hedge, pinning the price.
Significant Put OI in MONTHLY (16436) and 0DTE (6158). Coincides with 0DTE Max Pain, providing a solid structural floor.
Major institutional Put Wall in MONTHLY (22802) and 0DTE (7752). Ultimate defensive barrier for the current structure.
Top Put OI in 0DTE (8030) and WEEKLY (6785). Deep out-of-the-money downside buffer heavily defended by dealers.

market_regime.interpretation: Call walls are temporary resistance (breakout likely). Put walls are strong support. Gamma flip acts as dynamic support.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Stable market with suppressed volatility due to massive positive GEX. Range-bound action expected between structural Call walls and distant Put supports.
outlook.summary: The market exhibits a massive positive Total GEX (1.37B), indicating dealers are heavily long gamma, which typically suppresses volatility and pins price within established ranges. Immediate upside is capped by a dense cluster of Call Walls (25500, 25600, 26000) showing RESONANCE across multiple expirations. While Max Pain is significantly lower (24350-24000), the positive GEX environment favors mean-reversion strategies near the upper resistance bounds rather than a direct collapse downward.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Heavy Call OI across 0DTE (226), WEEKLY (75), and MONTHLY (49). Major upside resistance and structural ceiling.
levels.sintesiOperativa: SELL AREA: Strong Call Wall resistance

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Significant Call OI across 0DTE (53), WEEKLY (64), and MONTHLY (86). Ultimate structural resistance cap.
CONFLUENCE: Massive MONTHLY Call OI (4009) combined with 0DTE Put OI (95). Clustered near multi-expiry Max Pain zone.
CONFLUENCE: Strong Call OI in 0DTE (151) and MONTHLY (172), reinforced by Monthly Put OI (61). Secondary resistance.
WALL: Dominant 0DTE Put OI (240) establishing the lower boundary for the current trading session.
WALL: High 0DTE Call OI (181) with massive volume (482). Spot is currently immediately above this level, acting as support/friction.
PIVOT: WEEKLY gamma equilibrium point. Marks critical transition threshold between positive and negative gamma regimes.
levels.sintesiOperativa: MM DEFENSE: Critical gamma pivot level
